gameTitle: Brain Age: Train Your Brain in Minutes a Day!

achievements.title: Young at Brain
achievements.description: Get a Brain Age of 20 after a three minigame Check
achievements.author: Biendeo

achievements.title: Stamp of Approval
achievements.description: Earn your 1st stamp and unlock Low To High
achievements.author: Biendeo

achievements.title: There Are Two Syllables in "Stamp Two"
achievements.description: Earn your 2nd stamp and unlock Syllable Count
achievements.author: Biendeo

achievements.title: The Magic Number
achievements.description: Earn your 3rd stamp and unlock Head Count
achievements.author: Biendeo

achievements.title: Tip Your Hat
achievements.description: Earn your 5th stamp and unlock the tips section
achievements.author: Biendeo

achievements.title: Weeklong Trainer
achievements.description: Earn your 7th stamp and unlock the stamp designer
achievements.author: Biendeo

achievements.title: The Magic Number Multiplied by the Magic Number
achievements.description: Earn your 9th stamp and unlock the Hard mode for Head Count
achievements.author: Biendeo

achievements.title: Divide and Conquer
achievements.description: Earn your 11th stamp and unlock the Hard mode for Calculations x100 (unless you already got it, then it's just another stamp)
achievements.author: Biendeo

achievements.title: Geometric Stimuli
achievements.description: Earn your 13th stamp and unlock Triangle Math
achievements.author: Biendeo

achievements.title: Time for a Stamp
achievements.description: Earn your 15th stamp and unlock Time Lapse
achievements.author: Biendeo

achievements.title: Fractal Stamper
achievements.description: Earn your 17th stamp and unlock Hard mode for Triangle Math
achievements.author: Biendeo

achievements.title: Tip Collector
achievements.description: Earn your 20th stamp and unlock Voice Calculation
achievements.author: Biendeo

achievements.title: A Full Tip Jar
achievements.description: Earn your 23rd stamp and complete your tip collection
achievements.author: Biendeo

achievements.title: Now I Know My A-1-B-2-C-3s
achievements.description: Get a time of 50 seconds or less in Connect Maze
achievements.author: Biendeo

achievements.title: Look See Cover Write Check
achievements.description: Get a score of at least 22 in Word Memory
achievements.author: Biendeo

achievements.title: I Am a Camera
achievements.description: Get a perfect score of 30 in Word Memory
achievements.author: Biendeo

achievements.title: Putting Sherlock to Shame
achievements.description: Get a time of 60 seconds or less in Number Cruncher
achievements.author: Biendeo

achievements.title: One Stroop, Two Stroop, Red Stroop, Blue Stroop
achievements.description: Get a time of 50 seconds or less in Stroop Test
achievements.author: Biendeo

achievements.title: Onetwothreefourfivesixseveneightnineten
achievements.description: Get a time of 45 seconds or less in Speed Counting (and you must only tap the screen once)
achievements.author: Biendeo

achievements.title: Ticketmaster Practise
achievements.description: Get a time of under 16 seconds in Speed Counting
achievements.author: Biendeo

achievements.title: Simple Mathematics
achievements.description: Get a Rocket Speed time of 12 seconds or less in Calculations x20
achievements.author: Biendeo

achievements.title: Century Cruiser
achievements.description: Get a Rocket Speed time of 65 seconds or less in Calculations x100 Normal
achievements.author: Biendeo

achievements.title: Quotient Crusher
achievements.description: Get a Rocket Speed time of 65 seconds or less in Calculations x100 Hard
achievements.author: Biendeo

achievements.title: Greedy Reader
achievements.description: Get told off for speed reading
achievements.author: Biendeo

achievements.title: Intergalactic Prose
achievements.description: Get a Rocket Speed score of 12.0 syllables per second or higher in Reading Aloud
achievements.author: Biendeo

achievements.title: Order Up
achievements.description: Get a score of at least 60 in Low To High
achievements.author: Biendeo

achievements.title: The Big O
achievements.description: Get a perfect score of 91 in Low To High
achievements.author: Biendeo

achievements.title: How Man-y Sy-lla-bles Are In This Sen-tence?
achievements.description: Get a Rocket Speed time of 60 seconds or less in Syllable Count
achievements.author: Biendeo

achievements.title: House Party
achievements.description: Get a perfect score of 5 in Head Count Normal
achievements.author: Biendeo

achievements.title: In Through the Out Door
achievements.description: Get a perfect score of 5 in Head Count Hard
achievements.author: Biendeo

achievements.title: Pascal Performer
achievements.description: Get a Rocket Speed time of 30 seconds or less in Triangle Math Normal
achievements.author: Biendeo

achievements.title: Isoceles Imagination
achievements.description: Get a Rocket Speed score of 30 seconds or less in Triangle Math Hard
achievements.author: Biendeo

achievements.title: No Lapses in Judgement
achievements.description: Get a Rocket Speed time of 40 seconds or less in Time Lapse
achievements.author: Biendeo

achievements.title: Hear Me Count
achievements.description: Get a Rocket Speed time of 55 seconds or less in Voice Calculation
achievements.author: Biendeo

achievements.title: Note-table
achievements.description: Get asked something you did in the past by Dr. Kawashima
achievements.author: Biendeo

achievements.title: Pocket Picasso
achievements.description: Try your hand at some art
achievements.author: Biendeo
